final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster (小红书 cover, 9:16) announcing that GPT-image-2 is now live on the Lovart platform, with a high-end editorial magazine aesthetic.

Style/medium: high-end editorial magazine cover, flat graphic design with bold typographic hierarchy, inspired by Vogue or Wired cover layouts
Composition: diagonal composition — key visual elements and text blocks arranged along a strong diagonal axis from bottom-left to top-right, creating dynamic tension; portrait orientation
Subject: bold typographic announcement featuring "GPT-image-2" as the dominant headline and "Lovart" as a secondary accent wordmark; abstract geometric or tech-inspired graphic element reinforcing the diagonal
Scene/backdrop: clean, minimal background — solid deep black or off-white to maximize contrast
Lighting/mood: flat graphic lighting, no photographic shadows; high-contrast, sharp, editorial confidence
Color palette: high-contrast base (deep black vs. crisp white) with one vivid high-saturation accent color (electric blue or neon coral) used sparingly to punch focal points
Text (verbatim): "GPT-image-2" and "Lovart"
Constraints: text "GPT-image-2" and "Lovart" must be legible and preserved exactly; diagonal layout must be visually dominant; no gradients that muddy contrast
Avoid: generic tech stock imagery, lens flare, drop shadows, cluttered layout, pastel tones, watermark
